productDisplayName: Casio EDIFICE Men Chronograph Watch ED61 EF-305D-1AVDF
description: Style Note Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes casio watches irreplaceable timepieces. This classic wrist watch is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece, with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Analog chronographic watch with a round steel case and smaller dials displaying, 24 hour time, day of the week and date Dial style: Black dial with black and white hands Strap style: Stainless steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Screw to set time, date, 24 hour time and day of the week Water resistance up to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not high board diving and surfing Warranty: 2 years Material and Care Stainless steel Wipe with a clean dry cloth when needed Size Case diameter: 37 mm Case thickness: 6 mm
